title: Form of notices, records, etc.
content:
(1)	
The Commissioner may specify the form of any consent, 
Last updated date
1.5.2025
Employment Ordinance
Part XI	
11-2
Section 47	
Cap. 57
Verified Copy
request, notice in writing, certificate, application, record or 
return required for the purposes of this Ordinance. (Amended 
52 of 1988 s. 15)
	
(2)	
The Commissioner may publish in the Gazette any forms 
specified by him under subsection (1).
